meaning: adj.横放的vt.反对,阻碍,横过adv.prep.横过n.[船]横坐板
examples: The security forces were doing all they could to thwart terrorists.
In The Avengers, the all-star ensemble must thwart a possible world-ending scheme devised by Thor's villainous brother Loki.
The Decade can help thwart this needless loss of life.
Some use encryption (of the sort used to protect charge card numbers) to thwart the censors.
If anyone should know how to thwart a hacker, it's the folks at the Pentagon, right?
